contents.markdown:
# Video: 00:00.733 => 00:15.467
Width: 1080
Height: 608

Transcript
```
WEBVTT

00:01.360 --> 00:06.640
<Speaker 1>When it comes to the neural TTS, in order to get a good voice, it's better to have good data.

00:07.120 --> 00:13.320
<Speaker 2>To achieve that, we build a universal TTS model based on 3,000 hours of data.

00:13.440 --> 00:23.680
<Speaker 1>We actually accumulated tons of the data so that this universal model is able to capture the nuance of the audio and generate a more natural voice for the algorithm.
```

Key Frames
- 00:00.733 ![](keyFrame.733.jpg)
- 00:02.067 ![](keyFrame.2067.jpg)
- 00:02.667 ![](keyFrame.2667.jpg)
- 00:04.067 ![](keyFrame.4067.jpg)
- 00:04.900 ![](keyFrame.4900.jpg)
- 00:05.733 ![](keyFrame.5733.jpg)
- 00:06.567 ![](keyFrame.6567.jpg)
- 00:07.800 ![](keyFrame.7800.jpg)
- 00:09.000 ![](keyFrame.9000.jpg)
- 00:09.800 ![](keyFrame.9800.jpg)
- 00:10.600 ![](keyFrame.10600.jpg)
- 00:12.100 ![](keyFrame.12100.jpg)
- 00:12.833 ![](keyFrame.12833.jpg)
- 00:14.200 ![](keyFrame.14200.jpg)
- 00:14.833 ![](keyFrame.14833.jpg)
- 00:15.467 ![](keyFrame.15467.jpg)

Summary.valueString: The video opens with a scenic aerial view of an island and a small plane flying over it, accompanied by the Flight Simulator and Microsoft Azure AI logos. It then transitions to a discussion about neural text-to-speech (TTS) technology, emphasizing the importance of high-quality data. The speaker explains the creation of a universal TTS model trained on 3,000 hours of data to capture audio nuances and produce natural-sounding voices. Visuals include audio waveforms and shots of data centers and server rooms, highlighting the technological infrastructure behind the TTS model.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 1
transcriptPhrases.text: When it comes to the neural TTS, in order to get a good voice, it's better to have good data.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 2
transcriptPhrases.text: To achieve that, we build a universal TTS model based on 3,000 hours of data.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 1
transcriptPhrases.text: We actually accumulated tons of the data so that this universal model is able to capture the nuance of the audio and generate a more natural voice for the algorithm.

Summary.valueString: The video shifts to showcasing the high fidelity and human-like quality of the cognitive services' TTS offerings. This is illustrated with cinematic shots of a rural landscape, a data center, and a small red biplane flying over a coastal area. The visuals emphasize the realism and naturalness of the generated voices. The segment concludes with a medieval castle scene and a plane flying nearby, reinforcing the immersive experience enabled by the technology.

contents.markdown:
# Video: 00:23.100 => 00:43.233
Width: 1080
Height: 608

Transcript
```
WEBVTT

00:24.040 --> 00:29.120
<Speaker 3>What we liked about cognitive services offerings were that they had a much higher fidelity.

00:29.600 --> 00:32.880
<Speaker 3>And they sounded a lot more like an actual human voice.

00:33.680 --> 00:37.200
<Speaker 4>Orlando ground 9555 requesting the end of pushback.

00:38.680 --> 00:41.280
<Speaker 4>9555 request to end pushback received.
```

Key Frames

Summary.valueString: The final segment features an airport scene with a commercial airplane labeled 'Airbus' being guided by ground crew. The audio includes realistic air traffic control communications, such as a request to end pushback and the corresponding acknowledgment. The segment ends with the Microsoft logo on a black background, signaling the conclusion of the video.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 3
transcriptPhrases.text: What we liked about cognitive services offerings were that they had a much higher fidelity.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 3
transcriptPhrases.text: And they sounded a lot more like an actual human voice.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 4
transcriptPhrases.text: Orlando ground 9555 requesting the end of pushback.

# Video: 00:00.733 => 00:15.467
Width: 1080
Height: 608

Transcript
```
WEBVTT

00:01.360 --> 00:06.640
<Speaker 1>When it comes to the neural TTS, in order to get a good voice, it's better to have good data.

00:07.120 --> 00:13.320
<Speaker 2>To achieve that, we build a universal TTS model based on 3,000 hours of data.

00:13.440 --> 00:23.680
<Speaker 1>We actually accumulated tons of the data so that this universal model is able to capture the nuance of the audio and generate a more natural voice for the algorithm.
```

Key Frames

- 00:14.833 ![](keyFrame.14833.jpg)
- 00:15.467 ![](keyFrame.15467.jpg)

Summary.valueString: The video opens with a Flight Simulator plane flying over an island, introducing a collaboration with Microsoft Azure AI. A speaker discusses the importance of high-quality data for neural text-to-speech (TTS) technology, mentioning a universal TTS model trained on 3,000 hours of data to capture audio nuances and produce natural-sounding voices. Visuals include audio waveforms and data centers, emphasizing the technology's sophistication.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 1
transcriptPhrases.text: When it comes to the neural TTS, in order to get a good voice, it's better to have good data.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 2
transcriptPhrases.text: To achieve that, we build a universal TTS model based on 3,000 hours of data.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 1
transcriptPhrases.text: We actually accumulated tons of the data so that this universal model is able to capture the nuance of the audio and generate a more natural voice for the algorithm.

contents.markdown:
# Video: 00:00.733 => 00:43.233
Width: 1080
Height: 608

Transcript
```
WEBVTT

00:01.360 --> 00:06.640
<Speaker 1>When it comes to the neural TTS, in order to get a good voice, it's better to have good data.

00:07.120 --> 00:13.320
<Speaker 2>To achieve that, we build a universal TTS model based on 3,000 hours of data.

00:13.440 --> 00:23.680
<Speaker 1>We actually accumulated tons of the data so that this universal model is able to capture the nuance of the audio and generate a more natural voice for the algorithm.

00:24.040 --> 00:29.120
<Speaker 3>What we liked about cognitive services offerings were that they had a much higher fidelity.

00:29.600 --> 00:32.880
<Speaker 3>And they sounded a lot more like an actual human voice.

00:33.680 --> 00:37.200
<Speaker 4>Orlando ground 9555 requesting the end of pushback.

00:38.680 --> 00:41.280
<Speaker 4>9555 request to end pushback received.
```

Summary.valueString: The video opens with a Flight Simulator plane flying over an island, introducing a collaboration with Microsoft Azure AI. A speaker discusses the importance of high-quality data for neural text-to-speech (TTS) technology, mentioning a universal TTS model trained on 3,000 hours of data to capture audio nuances and produce natural voices. Visuals include audio waveforms and data centers, emphasizing the technology's sophistication. The scene transitions to scenic aerial views of landscapes and castles, showcasing the realistic graphics of the flight simulator. Another speaker highlights the high fidelity and human-like quality of cognitive services' voice offerings. The segment concludes with realistic airport ground operations and an airplane preparing for pushback, accompanied by air traffic control communications.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 1
transcriptPhrases.text: When it comes to the neural TTS, in order to get a good voice, it's better to have good data.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 2
transcriptPhrases.text: To achieve that, we build a universal TTS model based on 3,000 hours of data.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 1
transcriptPhrases.text: We actually accumulated tons of the data so that this universal model is able to capture the nuance of the audio and generate a more natural voice for the algorithm.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 3
transcriptPhrases.text: What we liked about cognitive services offerings were that they had a much higher fidelity.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 3
transcriptPhrases.text: And they sounded a lot more like an actual human voice.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 4
transcriptPhrases.text: Orlando ground 9555 requesting the end of pushback.
